summary: FR-THR-10 Thread Rollup Paid Cost A: extend the read-only thread rollup so a parent surfaces observed paid-cost evidence (moved/cancelled event cancel fields) from direct nodes + hard-contained descendants, reusing the decomposed settlement cost shape. No migration, route, DB write, Gmail, or LLM. Committed 8fea5b4.
